data.title: Jackalope Brewing Co. acquires Black Abbey Brewing Co in Nashville on Jan. 22, 2026. Joining forces for expansion.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on January 22, 2026, Jackalope Brewing Company revealed the acquisition of Black Abbey Brewing Company. This move brings together two established figures in the Tennessee craft beer scene. Jackalope is embarking on a strategic expansion phase with this acquisition.

data.title: Consumers trust AI more in 2025, according to ARF study, despite privacy concerns. Trust in AI rose sharply.
data.description: In 2025, trust in artificial intelligence showed a significant increase, as highlighted in The ARF's 8th Annual Privacy Study. Despite this rise in trust, consumers remained adamant about the importance of transparency and control in AI practices. The study reported a notable uptick in trust towards AI during 2025.

data.title: Contemporary Services Corporation appreciates NCAA Athletics partners for a successful 2025-2026 postseason in crowd management and event security.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Los Angeles, Contemporary Services Corporation (CSC), a prominent provider of crowd management, event security, and guest services, expressed gratitude to its collegiate partners and clients for choosing CSC to oversee security at NCAA football games and bowl events. CSC is recognized as the top company in the nation offering these services.

data.title: Amber Semiconductor (AmberSemi) wins 2026 Innovation Award from San Francisco Bay Area East Bay Economic Development Alliance.
data.description: In Dublin, California on January 22, 2026, Amber Semiconductor, Inc. (AmberSemi™), a leading fabless semiconductor firm specializing in advanced power management solutions for data centers, revealed that the San Francisco Bay Area - East Bay Economic Development Alliance has acknowledged their achievements.

data.title: FOX Nation seals new long-term deal with Real American Freestyle, extending broadcast partnership.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, FOX Nation revealed an extended collaboration with Real American Freestyle (RAF) by finalizing a new long-term deal to continue as the sole broadcaster for the up-and-coming freestyle wrestling league. This announcement was made by FOX Nation president, Lauren Petterson.

data.title: Telehealth provider Q Care Plus expands services to include hair loss, birth control, and erectile dysfunction meds in response to patient demand.
data.description: Responding to the increasing demand from patients for holistic and inclusive healthcare, Q Care Plus, a telehealth provider based in Plano, Texas, has announced an extension of its services. Renowned for its expertise in HIV prevention, treatment, and sexual wellness care, the company aims to provide comprehensive and stigma-free care. This initiative, launched on January 22, 2026, is expected to cater to a larger audience seeking whole-person health solutions.

data.title: A film titled ‘Sinners’ makes history with 16 Oscar nominations, followed closely by “One Battle After Another” with 13 nods. Notable acting nominees are Teyana Taylor, Elle Fanning, Sean Penn, and Delroy Lindo.
data.description: The film "One Battle After Another" follows closely with a total of 13 nominations. Among the acting nominees are Teyana Taylor, Elle Fanning, Sean Penn, and Delroy Lindo.

data.title: House of Doge and Brag House Holdings launch the 21shares Dogecoin ETF (TDOG), providing regulated exposure of Dogecoin to US investors.
data.description: A recently launched exchange-traded fund (ETF) now provides U.S. investors with regulated exposure to Dogecoin, a popular cryptocurrency. This unique offering is backed by physical Dogecoin assets, allowing investors to participate in the market with heightened transparency and oversight. The ETF opens up opportunities for individuals seeking to invest in Dogecoin within a regulated framework. With this development, investors can gain access to Dogecoin through a structured and monitored avenue, offering a new way to engage with the digital asset.

data.title: P&G reports mixed quarterly results: EPS at $1.88 beats estimate, sales at $22.208B miss view, with 1% net sales increase.
data.description: Procter & Gamble Company's (NYSE: PG) stock saw a decrease following the release of its second-quarter financial results. Adjusted earnings per share came in at $1.88, surpassing the expected $1.86. Quarterly sales reached $22.208 billion, falling short of the anticipated $22.282 billion. Net sales rose by 1% compared to the previous year, but organic sales remained flat at 0%. The Beauty segment experienced growth in organic sales due to strong performance in Hair, Personal, and Skin Care driven by innovative pricing, volume increases, and a premium product mix. Grooming sales stayed unchanged as pricing gains were offset by volume reductions. Health Care saw organic growth, mainly driven by slight improvements in Oral and Personal Health Care from pricing strategies and premium products, despite facing challenges in volume and product mix. Fabric and Home Care reported stagnant sales, while Baby, Feminine, and Family Care experienced a decline due to volume issues and tough comparisons with the previous year. Overall, the company faced margin pressures following these results.

data.title: MGT launches new Artisan Contractor BOP, offering coverage for contractors with liability & property insurance in under 3 minutes.
data.description: In San Francisco, MGT, a vertically integrated AI-centric neo-insurer, introduced its Artisan Contractor Business Owner’s Package (BOP) tailored for trades like plumbers, electricians, and painters. The package combines general liability and property protection. Utilizing MGT’s exclusive AI technology, insurance agents can swiftly generate quotes and secure coverage within three minutes, revolutionizing speed and underwriting precision for artisan contractors. This innovative product is designed for small spec.

data.title: Jennifer J. Hill named President of Balfour Beatty Communities' Military Housing, effective Jan 26, 2026. Overseeing ops and resident experience.
data.description: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, Balfour Beatty Communities (Communities) has named Jennifer J. Hill as President of its Military Housing business, starting from January 26, 2026. Hill's responsibilities will encompass overseeing all aspects of Communities' military housing operations to improve operational efficiency, elevate resident satisfaction, and build stronger relationships with the Department of War and the Services. She will be reporting directly to Gavin Russell, the CEO.

data.title: Aesthetic Management Partners introduces AMPlifi Rewards Program for practice partners, offering exclusive benefits for bio serums.
data.description: A top aesthetic company has introduced a new loyalty program aimed at boosting practice participation, improving patient results, and providing exclusive rewards for customers using AMP's specialized bio serums and regenerative items. The program was launched in CORDOVA, Tenn., on Jan. 22, 2026, in partnership with PRNewswire.
